SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-06-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:19 am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.

Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant Felicia Levy Weston appears in pro per. Respondents Andrea Ortega and Tina Fisher appear in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

No documents were marked.

9:47am
Matter submitted.
